Character-model.description: Configure Oh My Lite OpenAgent character role models from the OpenCode TUI.
Character-model.template:
Configure per-role models for Oh My Lite OpenAgent.

## How to use

Call the tool `bounded_lite_model_config` with the `action` parameter:

### action=auto — Auto-configure all roles

Best model for each role is picked automatically based on what the role needs:

| Role              | Needs                  | Best models first                          |
|-------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| command-lead      | Strongest reasoning    | Claude Opus → GPT-5.4 → Gemini Pro → Claude Sonnet → Kimi K2 → GPT-4o → GLM-5 → MiniMax → big-pickle |
| plan-builder      | Strong reasoning       | Claude Opus → GPT-5.4 → Gemini Pro → Claude Sonnet → Kimi K2 → GPT-4o → GLM-5 → MiniMax → big-pickle |
| deep-plan-builder | Advisory (weaker OK)   | Claude Sonnet → Kimi K2 → Gemini Flash → GPT-5.4 → Claude Opus → GPT-4o → Codex → GLM-5 → MiniMax → big-pickle |
| task-lead         | Mid-tier execution      | Claude Sonnet → Kimi K2 → GPT-5.4 → Gemini Pro → GPT-4o → Codex → MiniMax → GPT-5-nano → big-pickle |
| explore           | Fast & cheap            | GPT-5.4-mini → Claude Haiku → MiniMax HighSpeed → MiniMax → Gemini Flash → GPT-5-nano → big-pickle |
| librarian         | Fast & cheap            | GPT-5.4-mini → Claude Haiku → MiniMax HighSpeed → MiniMax → Gemini Flash → GPT-5-nano → big-pickle |
| plan-review       | Strongest reasoning     | GPT-5.4 → Claude Opus → Gemini Pro → Claude Sonnet → GPT-4o → GLM-5 → MiniMax → big-pickle |
| result-review     | Strongest reasoning     | GPT-5.4 → Claude Opus → Gemini Pro → Claude Sonnet → GPT-4o → GLM-5 → MiniMax → big-pickle |

Example call:
```
bounded_lite_model_config({ action: "auto" })
```
This reads your OpenCode provider config, picks the best available model for each role, and writes the assignments.

### action=list — Show current config and available models

Example call:
```
bounded_lite_model_config({ action: "list" })
```
Shows every role's current model and all models available from your providers.

### action=apply — Manually assign specific models

Example call:
```
bounded_lite_model_config({ action: "apply", assignments: { "command-lead": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-7", "explore": "openai/gpt-5.4-mini" } })
```
The `assignments` object maps role names to `provider/model` strings. Only known roles are updated. Unknown roles are skipped. Models not in your provider list get a warning but are still written.

## Typical workflow

1. Run `action=auto` first to get the best automatic setup.
2. Review the result. If you want to change specific roles, use `action=apply`.
3. Use `action=list` anytime to check current state.

Preserve unrelated OpenCode config. Do not remove existing provider, model, or API key settings.

command-lead.description: Main orchestrator for execution work with approval and state ownership.

plan-builder.description: Visible planner with explicit discussion mode for user-facing planning and internal normalize mode for stable skeleton convergence.

deep-plan-builder.description: Visible deep planner using mandatory plan review to compensate a weaker planning model.

build.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode build mode; use command-lead.

plan.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode plan mode; use plan-builder or deep-plan-builder.

task-lead.description: Single-task orchestrator for bounded local complexity with max depth one.

explore.description: Read-only local exploration of files, structure, and code context.

librarian.description: External documentation and OSS reference lookup with no edit authority.

plan-review.description: Plan review specialist that evaluates plan artifacts and may request read-only Explore evidence.

result-review.description: Optional result review specialist for Command Lead execution summaries, with read-only Explore evidence when needed.
